source: etfdb.com High Momentum ETF list (sorted by AUM desc) + QQQ, VGT. AUM ($M), reference price and average volume captured 2026-07-01; expense/inception filled where confidently known, else null. Holdings are approximate top weights for verification only — verify current data with the issuer.
note: Add or remove an ETF by editing the etfs[] array (ticker + name are the only required fields). This file is fetched at load; if it is unreachable the tool falls back to an inline copy of the same universe. All analytics are computed from LIVE fetched price history, not from the reference numbers below.

etfs.name: iShares MSCI USA Momentum Factor ETF
etfs.desc: MSCI USA Momentum SR Variant Index — US large/mid caps ranked on 6- and 12-month risk-adjusted price momentum; rebalanced semiannually.

etfs.name: Invesco S&P 500 Momentum ETF
etfs.desc: S&P 500 Momentum Index — the ~100 S&P 500 names with the highest momentum score, weighted by momentum x market cap.

etfs.desc: S&P MidCap 400 Momentum Index — the 80 mid-cap names with the strongest upward price momentum.
